summary: Complete scope module testing: 23 backend tests all PASS, frontend UI fully functional. KPI cards show SEC=9, ÉTENDU=6, OUT=2, Surcharge=1. All 7 scope endpoints working correctly. RBAC enforced for scope.arbitrate/scope.freeze permissions.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be child of <option> element - causes hydration warning. Template literals in option text should not use JSX expressions inline inside <option> tags. Minor cosmetic issue, no functional impact.

action_items: Minor: Fix hydration warning - option tag in snapshot-version-select uses <span> inside <option> which is invalid HTML. Use template literals instead of JSX expressions in option text.
critical_code_review_comments: Scope.jsx line 487: <option> contains dynamic JSX with <span> wrapper injected by dev tools - this is a React hydration warning (not a real bug, dev-mode only). In production build, this won't be an issue.

service.py transmit_snapshot: Re-fetches snapshot via get_snapshot() which already includes features, but the snapshot was fetched to check status. The PDF generation uses snap.get('features') which was excluded from list but included in get_snapshot - OK.
service.py list_snapshots: Correctly excludes 'features' field from list response (performance optimization).
seed_data_creation: Tests created test snapshots: PI-3 2026, PI-AUTOINCREMENT-TEST (x2), PI-TRANSMIT-TEST 2026, PI-DOUBLE-TRANSMIT-TEST, PI-GANTT-TEST 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scope module fully tested and working. 23/23 backend tests pass. Frontend shows correct KPIs (SEC=9, ÉTENDU=6, OUT=2, Equipes surcharge=1). Inline scope_status dropdown works, freeze modal functional, snapshot versioning correct (v6 now after tests), capacity block shows SURCHARGE for Dev A's team. RBAC enforced: manager gets 403 on PATCH status and POST snapshot. Snapshots v1-v5 exist. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_scope_module.py

verified_features.GET /api/scope/candidates: PASS - returns tasks with scope_status, estimations
verified_features.GET /api/scope/capacity: PASS - returns teams with rouge status (surcharge)
verified_features.POST /api/scope/snapshots/{id}/transmit: PASS - PDF base64 returned, 409 on re-transmit
verified_features.Page /scope UI: PASS - KPI cards, ScopeTable, CapacityVsLoad, filters all working
verified_features.RBAC scope.freeze: PASS - manager gets 403 on snapshot creation and gantt-compute
verified_features.Inline dropdown: PASS - dropdown opens with sec/etendu/out options
verified_features.Freeze modal: PASS - opens with period_ref input and confirm button
verified_features.Snapshot history dropdown: PASS - shows 7 snapshots with status labels
